case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. KERWIN ROBERTO BONILLA MACHADO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT KERWIN ROBERTO BONILLA MACHADO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACHADO, KERWIN ROBERTO BONILLA $642.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $727.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
